feed.title: Biendeo's Fun Website
feed.subtitle: A cool website where I talk about matters on my mind, and showcase cool things I've worked on.

entry.title: Cataloguing every song in every PS2 SingStar release

link.title: Cataloguing every song in every PS2 SingStar release

entry.summary: Here’s a photo of my real SingStar box from way back in the day. SingStar was Sony’s foray into the karaoke genre of video games; a genre which simply involves singing into a microphone and being graded on your accuracy to match the notes put in front of you. The genre dates way back before video games achieved mainstream, but other than some curious releases such as Bandai’s Karaoke Studio...
